name: insurance_pricing
description: an insurance premium-pricing world by risk pool; actions quote, bind, renew, lapse

card.description: an insurance premium-pricing world by risk pool; actions quote, bind, renew, lapse

rules: Premium = base_premium * risk_factor[risk_pool] * (1 + claims_load), rounded to cents.
Each risk pool has a fixed relative risk factor; higher-risk pools price higher.
quote prices the active pool and sets status to 'quoted'; it never changes the in-force book.
bind is only valid from a 'quoted' status; it locks the quote, increments policies_in_force and adds the premium to written_premium.
renew is only valid from a 'bound' status; claims experience drifts up by renewal_drift and the policy is repriced at the higher load.
lapse is only valid from a 'bound' status; it removes the policy from force and increments lapsed_count.
Illegal actions for the current status are no-ops, leaving state unchanged.
An action may switch the active risk pool by passing params.risk_pool.

emit.report: Pool '{risk_pool}': {policies_in_force} in force across {renewals} renewals, ${written_premium} written premium, {lapsed_count} lapsed; current bound premium ${bound_premium}.
